name: Markazia Toyota
description: Official and exclusive Toyota distributor in Jordan, established in 1999. Operations include automobile sales, service and parts, supported by five dealers across the Kingdom, two service centers and a parts depot.

name: Bustami & Saheb
description: Established in 1969, Bustami & Saheb is the exclusive dealer of Nissan and Infiniti in Jordan, fully equipped with facilities and a professional workforce delivering world-class standards.

name: Abu Khader Group
description: A leading automotive group in Jordan specializing in auto spare parts and accessories, located on Mecca Street in Amman. Represents multiple international automotive brands.

name: Barqawi Motors
description: An established automotive dealership in Jordan offering a range of vehicles and automotive services.

name: Rifat Yaish & Sons
description: A leading automotive OE and high-quality spare parts distributor in Jordan, Palestine and the Levant region.

name: Asas Auto Parts
description: A major auto parts trading company in Jordan providing a wide range of vehicle spare parts and accessories.

name: Tarkhan & Son Ahmad Co.
description: Opened its first auto parts shop in Amman in 1964 in the Almahatta area. A well-established automotive spare parts company with decades of experience.

name: Autoexcellence
description: A privately owned company founded over 59 years ago as a leading service and parts distribution operation in Jordan.

name: National Arab Motors
description: Authorized KIA dealer and distributor in Jordan.

name: Mercedes-Benz Cars Jordan
description: Established dealership and servicing specialist for Mercedes-Benz vehicles in Jordan, part of the authorized MENA dealer network.

name: CIC - Ford Jordan
description: CIC is the authorized Ford agent and distributor in Jordan, offering Ford vehicles and after-sales services.

name: Tahboub Automotive
description: Authorized Honda dealer in Amman, Jordan, providing Honda vehicles, genuine parts and after-sales services.

name: Carrefour Jordan
description: Carrefour operates in Jordan through its local partner Majid Al Futtaim with hypermarkets and supermarkets across the country. Carrefour first entered Jordan in 2006 with outlets including a major hypermarket at City Mall.

name: Cozmo
description: An upmarket supermarket chain with six branches, all in Amman. Known for premium grocery and household products targeting mid-to-high income shoppers.

name: Safeway Jordan
description: Safeway operates six full-service stores in Jordan, along with two wholesale centres and eight Safeway X-press convenience stores across the Kingdom.

name: C-Town Jordan
description: One of the major retail chains in Jordan offering grocery and household products.

name: IKEA Jordan
description: IKEA Jordan is located on Airport Road after Madaba Bridge in Amman and is IKEA's largest store in the Middle East with an area of 42,000 square meters.

name: Home Center Jordan
description: A well-known regional furniture and home decor retailer with a strong presence in Amman, offering a wide range of furniture, home accessories, and décor items.

name: Midas Jordan
description: A local furniture retailer where Jordanians find furniture they are proud of, with a collection spanning modern, classic, and everything in between, crafted to meet local family standards.

name: Mecca Mall
description: A major shopping destination in Amman since it opened in 2003, housing around 450 shops offering clothing, electronics, household appliances, and entertainment.

name: City Mall
description: A popular indoor shopping destination in Amman covering 160,000 square meters and housing various retail outlets for fashion, jewelry, electronics, and more. Home to a Carrefour hypermarket.

name: Abdali Mall
description: Located in the Abdali district of Amman, spanning over 227,000 square meters across four levels, offering international fashion brands, restaurants, cafes, cinemas, and entertainment.

name: Taj Lifestyle Center
description: A premium lifestyle and shopping center in Amman with over 190 outlets spread across five expansive levels, featuring international and local brands.

name: UNHCR Jordan
name_ar: مفوضية الأمم المتحدة السامية للاجئين - الأردن
description: UNHCR's main office in Jordan is located on Wasfi Al-Tal Street, Khalda, Amman. Through four offices in Amman, Mafraq, Azraq and Irbid, UNHCR maintains a robust presence with over 500 staff, supporting refugees and asylum seekers across the Kingdom.

name: UNICEF Jordan
description: UNICEF's office is located at 7 Leila Al-Akhleyah Street, Shumaysani, Amman. UNICEF's Middle East and North Africa Regional Office (MENARO) is also based in Amman, focusing on children's rights and welfare.

name: International Rescue Committee Jordan
description: The IRC operates in Jordan supporting Syrian refugees and vulnerable Jordanians with programs spanning health, education, economic welfare, and protection.

name: Mercy Corps Jordan
description: Mercy Corps helps communities across Jordan build climate resilience by addressing urgent needs while preparing for future shocks. Supports communities through partnerships with local governments and organizations to build economically secure futures.

name: Save the Children Jordan
description: Save the Children Jordan began its work in 1974. Headquarters at Princess Basma Center for Social Development, 8 Jameel Street, Amman. Programs have changed the lives of more than 1.5 million people in Jordan.

name: CARE Jordan
description: CARE offers humanitarian aid in Jordan helping refugees and host communities dealing with effects of conflict, particularly Syrian refugees.

name: World Vision Jordan
description: World Vision is part of a US-based consortium of NGOs operating in Amman, Jordan. Focuses on child wellbeing, education, and humanitarian response for refugees and vulnerable communities.

name: Jordan River Foundation
description: A Jordanian non-governmental organization working to empower individuals and communities through social and economic development programs. Founded by Queen Noor.

name: Noor Al Hussein Foundation
description: A Jordanian foundation focused on social and economic development, education, health, and community empowerment programs.

name: Royal Society for the Conservation of Nature (RSCN)
description: Also known as Wild Jordan, RSCN is a major environmental and ecological preservation agency in Jordan, managing nature reserves and promoting sustainable development.

name: LOYAC Jordan
description: A nonprofit organization working towards the overall development of youth, designing programs to facilitate professional development and personal growth for ages 6 to 30.

name: Amman Center for Human Rights Studies
description: A Jordanian organization dedicated to promoting human rights, democracy, and civil liberties through research, advocacy, and education.

name: ZENID - National Center for Human Resources Development
name_ar: زنيد - المركز الوطني لتنمية الموارد البشرية
description: A Jordanian organization focused on human resources development and capacity building for civil society and public sector organizations.

name: Roya Media Group
description: The largest privately owned media company in Jordan, owned by the Al-Sayegh family. Operates Roya TV, the largest leading independent TV channel in Jordan, and Roya News, providing multimedia coverage in Arabic and English.

name: Al Rai Newspaper / Jordan Press Foundation
description: Al Rai is an Arabic daily newspaper owned by Jordan Press Foundation. The state holds 55% of Al-Rai shares through its Social Security Corporation. It is one of the most widely-read newspapers in Jordan.

name: Al Ghad Newspaper
description: A major Jordanian daily Arabic newspaper owned by Mohammad Olayan, known for independent editorial coverage of local, regional, and international news.

name: Ad Dustour Newspaper
description: One of Jordan's main official daily newspapers. The state holds 33% of Addustour shares through its Social Security Corporation.

name: Al-Mamlaka TV
description: A publicly owned satellite TV channel in Jordan providing news and general programming, known as one of the major public TV channels in the Kingdom.

name: Jordan Radio and Television (JRTV)
description: The national public broadcaster of Jordan, operating land-based and satellite TV channels and radio stations. One of only two land-based terrestrial channels in Jordan.

name: Amman TV
description: One of the privately owned satellite TV channels in Jordan broadcasting news, entertainment and cultural content.

name: Petra News Agency
description: The official national news agency of Jordan, government-owned, providing official news and press releases.

name: Jordan Times
description: Jordan's leading English-language daily newspaper, providing comprehensive coverage of Jordanian, regional and international news.

name: Eagle Transport Services Company
description: Established in 1993 as a limited shareholding company providing forwarding and clearing services. Has departments for air, land and sea freight, packing, loss adjustment, and leasing of heavy cranes.

name: Naouri Group
description: Started in 1994 as a shipping agency and quickly expanded to include freight forwarding, customs clearance, land transportation, warehousing, and cargo inspection and testing.

name: Jerasa Logistics
description: Established in 2016 in Amman. One of the leading international freight forwarding and project logistics management companies, delivering solutions throughout the CIS and Middle East.

name: Seven Seas Shipping
description: An air freight company headquartered in Amman, Jordan, specializing in air freight and freight forwarding services.

name: Masa Logistics
description: A logistics company based in Amman, Jordan providing supply chain and logistics solutions.

name: Aramex Jordan
description: Founded in 1982 by Fadi Ghandour in Amman as an express operator. Today an international logistics company listed on the Dubai Financial Market, offering express delivery, air and ocean freight forwarding, logistics, and supply chain management.

name: G4S Jordan
description: The largest private security solutions provider in Jordan, active since 1982 with more than 1,500 employees offering security solutions across the Hashemite Kingdom.

name: Scorpion for Defense and Protection
description: A licensed security company based in Jordan providing integrated protection solutions including surveillance systems, professional guarding services, and security consultations, with headquarters in Amman and branches across the country.

name: Safwa Security
description: Founded in 2005 to provide physical security service solutions within the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan.

name: Aman Security and Armed Protection Company
description: Operates a 24-hour operations room to receive information and take required security actions across Jordan.

name: Arabtech Jardaneh
description: A leading construction and engineering firm in Jordan established in 1979 with a diverse portfolio including infrastructure, residential, and commercial buildings.

name: IMKAN for Multi Construction Enterprises
description: A construction company in Jordan that has completed various projects including hospital construction, private villa resorts, and school extensions in the region.

name: Ammoun Jordan Construction (AJC)
description: Established in 1984 under the former name Ammoun Maintenance & Contracting Company. Specializes in high-end residential construction.

name: CCC - Consolidated Contractors Company Jordan
description: A leading international construction company with a presence in over 40 countries. In Jordan, CCC has completed high-profile projects including the King Hussein Cancer Center.

name: Hikma Pharmaceuticals Jordan
description: The largest pharmaceutical company in Jordan, founded in Amman in 1978. Produces medicines from four manufacturing plants specializing in cephalosporins, general formulation, penicillin, and oncology. Now a British multinational listed in London.

name: Dar Al Dawa Development and Investment
description: A major Jordanian pharmaceutical company manufacturing and marketing a wide range of pharmaceutical products, part of JAPM membership.

name: Jordanian Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Co. (PLC)
description: One of the key pharmaceutical manufacturing companies in Jordan, member of the Jordanian Association of Pharmaceutical Manufacturers (JAPM).

name: Hayat Pharmaceutical Industries
description: A pharmaceutical manufacturer in Jordan producing a range of medical products, member of JAPM.

name: Philadelphia Pharmaceuticals
description: A Jordan-based pharmaceutical manufacturing company producing branded generics and pharmaceutical products.

name: Al Khalidi Medical Center
description: A renowned private hospital in Amman known for advanced medical care in specialties like cardiology, gynecology, obstetrics, and surgery, including IVF treatments and pediatric services.

name: Istishari Hospital
description: Located at 44 Al Kindi Street, King Abdullah Gardens Intersection, Amman. A 108-bed private teaching hospital committed to providing the highest quality patient care, recognized for excellent neurology and neurosurgery services.

name: Specialty Hospital
description: One of Jordan's leading private hospitals in Amman, renowned for comprehensive specialized medical services including cardiology, neurosurgery, pediatric treatments, and orthopedic surgeries.

name: Jordan University Hospital
description: A public teaching hospital on the University of Jordan campus in Jubeiha, Amman. The first university-affiliated teaching hospital in Jordan, handling over half a million patients annually.

name: Arab Bank
description: The largest bank in Jordan and one of the leading financial institutions in the Middle East. Founded in Jerusalem in 1930, it is registered in Jordan and offers retail, corporate, and investment banking services.

name: Jordan Ahli Bank
description: Established in 1955 as East Jordan's first national bank. Today maintains nearly 500 partnerships across 80 countries, offering a full range of banking and financial services.

name: Bank of Jordan
description: One of Jordan's top commercial banks, offering a comprehensive range of banking services to individuals and businesses.

name: Cairo Amman Bank
description: A leading Jordanian commercial bank providing retail and corporate banking services across Jordan and the region.

name: Arab Jordan Investment Bank (AJIB)
description: An investment and commercial bank in Jordan, listed on the Amman Stock Exchange, offering corporate banking, investment banking, and treasury services.

name: Bank of Etihad
description: A modern Jordanian commercial bank offering digital banking, retail, and corporate financial services.

name: Jordan Insurance Company (JIC)
description: Established in 1951, the oldest insurance company in Jordan and one of the oldest in the Middle East, offering life and non-life insurance products.

name: GIG Jordan (formerly Arab Orient Insurance)
description: Established in 1996. Joined the Gulf Insurance Group in 2009, becoming Gulf Insurance Group – Jordan (GIG Jordan). Part of one of the largest insurance groups in MENA, headquartered in Kuwait.

name: Al-Nisr Al-Arabi Insurance Company
description: Founded in 1976, one of the leading insurance providers in Jordan offering Life, Medical, Marine, Fire, Engineering, Liability, and General Accident insurance.

name: United Insurance Company PLC (UIC)
description: Incorporated in 1972, offering both Life and General Insurance solutions across Jordan.

name: Zain Jordan
description: One of Jordan's three major mobile operators (formerly Fastlink), founded in 1995. Headquarters at Boulevard Al-Abdali, Black Iris St, Amman. Part of Zain Group serving over 32 million customers across the Middle East and Africa.

name: Orange Jordan
description: One of Jordan's three major telecom operators and a subsidiary of the Orange Group operating in 26 countries. Provides mobile, internet, and fixed-line services.

name: Umniah
description: Jordan's third major mobile operator, founded in 2005 and headquartered in Amman with approximately 1,490 employees. Provides mobile and internet services.

name: Luminus Technology
description: Headquartered in Amman, founded in 2004 as a system integrator specializing in Extra Low Voltage (ELV) systems, Audio-Visual, Physical Security, ICT, Smart Building, and Home Automation.

name: University of Jordan
description: The largest and oldest public university in Jordan, founded in 1962. Located in Amman with 25 faculties offering 91 bachelor's programs and 161 postgraduate programs.

name: Princess Sumaya University for Technology (PSUT)
description: The only private and non-profit university in Jordan, founded in 1991 in Amman. Specializes in technology, engineering, and computing fields.

name: Four Seasons Hotel Amman
description: A five-star luxury hotel in Amman offering world-class hospitality services, fine dining, spa, and meeting facilities.

name: InterContinental Amman
description: A five-star hotel by IHG group, frequently cited as one of the best hotels in Amman offering exceptional accommodations and services.

name: Fairmont Amman
description: Located on Fifth Circle in Amman, within walking distance of Abdoun. Offers contemporary design, luxury accommodations, and unparalleled views of the Amman hills.

name: The Ritz-Carlton Amman
description: A celebrated five-star hotel in Amman, frequently praised for top-notch accommodations, unparalleled elegance, and exceptional luxury.

name: Grand Hyatt Amman
description: A five-star hotel in Amman part of the Hyatt Hotels & Resorts group, offering premium accommodations, dining, and conference facilities.

name: Elysium Investments & Development Company
description: An Amman-based, privately owned real estate development company specializing in tourism, entertainment and recreational projects.

name: Jordan Decapolis Properties
description: A Jordan-based public shareholding company engaged in real estate planning and investment. Part of its portfolio includes the Aqarco Commercial Center in Amman.

name: Homes Jordan
description: A real estate agency with over a decade of experience managing and marketing properties in top Amman locations including Dabouq, Abdoun, and Al Kursi.

name: Al Saudi Group for Real Estate Development
description: Founded in 1985, develops residential blocks and shopping centers professionally designed in Amman.

name: Hikma Pharmaceuticals Manufacturing Plants Jordan
description: Hikma's four Jordan-based manufacturing plants produce cephalosporins, general formulation drugs, penicillin, and oncology medicines for export to over 50 countries.

name: Yousef Al Akkad Sons Co.
description: A leading company in the import and export of foodstuffs, fish, meat and fresh and frozen poultry in Jordan.

name: Ahmad Zalatimo & Partners Co.
description: A well-known Jordanian food company, famous for traditional sweets including knafa and sweet cheese production.

name: Al-Methalia Co. for Dairy Products
description: A Jordanian dairy products manufacturer producing a range of quality dairy items including cheese, yogurt, and other dairy products.

name: Al Ameed Coffee
description: A Jordan-based coffee brand that controls most of the Jordanian market and has become synonymous with coffee regionally.

name: Jordan Vegetable Oil Factories Company
description: Specializes in the production and refining of vegetable oils using cutting-edge refining technology for the Jordanian market and export.

name: Universal Industries Co. Ltd.
description: A canned food manufacturer in Jordan producing a range of preserved and processed food products.

name: DeFacto Jordan
description: A popular Turkish fashion brand widely known in Amman, offering trendy yet affordable clothing for men, women, and children with styles ranging from casual to smart.

name: LC Waikiki Jordan
description: A popular Turkish clothing brand with a wide range of fashion for men, women, and children in Amman's major malls.

name: Koton Jordan
description: A Turkish clothing brand with an impressive selection of fashionable apparel featuring modern cuts, bold prints, and elegant styles in Amman's shopping centers.

name: Jerash Pharmaceuticals
description: A Jordanian pharmaceutical company producing branded generic medicines, member of the Jordanian Association of Pharmaceutical Manufacturers.

name: Arab Pesticides and Veterinary Drugs Mfg. Co.
name_ar: الشركة العربية لتصنيع المبيدات والأدوية البيطرية
description: A specialized manufacturer of pesticides and veterinary drugs in Jordan, member of JAPM.

name: Kurdi Group
description: The top construction company in Jordan by revenue with $1.9 billion, involved in large-scale construction and development projects across the Kingdom.

name: Atcco
description: A major Jordanian construction company with $897.2 million in revenue, undertaking large civil and industrial construction projects.

name: MID Contracting
description: One of Jordan's major construction contracting companies with $638.5 million in revenue, executing large infrastructure and building projects.

name: Zain Group (Jordan HQ)
description: Zain Jordan is part of the Zain Group with headquarters at Boulevard Al-Abdali, Amman. Zain provides mobile and fiber internet services and was founded in 1995 as Fastlink.

name: Global Communities Jordan
description: International NGO operating in Jordan focused on community development, economic empowerment, and support for refugees and host communities.

name: WANA Institute (West Asia North Africa Institute)
description: A Jordanian policy research and civil society support organization promoting the Jordan Civil Society Initiative and regional policy dialogue.

name: Ohana Jordan
description: A Jordanian clothing brand focused on providing stylish yet affordable fashion for the local market.

name: Visionary Jordan
description: A Jordan-based sustainable fashion brand creating high-quality loungewear, manufacturing all pieces locally in Jordan.

name: Crowne Plaza Amman
description: A five-star hotel by IHG in Amman offering premium accommodations, conference facilities, and dining options.

name: Sheraton Amman Al Nabil Hotel
description: A five-star Sheraton hotel in Amman offering luxury accommodations, dining, wellness facilities, and business services.

name: Hilton Amman
description: A Hilton branded five-star hotel in Amman offering premium accommodations, dining, and meeting facilities.

name: Movenpick Hotel Amman
description: A five-star Movenpick (Accor) hotel in Amman offering premium accommodations, renowned dining, spa, and event facilities.

name: Jerusalem Insurance Company
description: A Jordanian insurance company headquartered in Amman providing a range of general insurance products and services.

name: Islamic Insurance Company
description: A Jordanian Takaful (Islamic insurance) company offering Sharia-compliant insurance products for individuals and businesses.

name: Medgulf Jordan
description: A regional insurance company with operations in Jordan offering life, health, and general insurance products.

name: Jordan Telecom Group (Orange)
description: The incumbent national telecom operator of Jordan, now operating as Orange Jordan, providing fixed-line, mobile, and internet services.

name: Abu Judom Real Estate Company
description: The first real estate developer in Amman Jordan, founded in 1950. A pioneer in the Jordanian real estate sector.

name: Jo TV
description: One of the privately owned satellite TV channels in Jordan, broadcasting news, entertainment, and cultural content.

name: Jordanian Association of Pharmaceutical Manufacturers (JAPM)
description: Founded in 1996, JAPM has 13 pharmaceutical companies as main members contributing 95% of total pharmaceutical manufacturing in Jordan.

name: Almasar Alkamel for Trans-Logistic Services
description: An Amman-based company offering freight forwarding and logistics & supply chain consulting services.

name: Spex Express
description: An Amman, Jordan-based air freight and delivery company offering air freight and freight forwarding services.

name: MEICO Insurance
description: A public shareholding company listed on the Amman Stock Exchange that transacts both Life and Non-Life Insurance products in Jordan.

name: W Amman
description: A W Hotels (Marriott) five-star luxury hotel in Amman offering contemporary design, trendy dining, rooftop bar, and premium event spaces.

name: Amman Rotana
description: A Rotana five-star hotel in Amman offering upscale accommodations, dining, and business facilities.

name: St. Regis Amman
description: A five-star St. Regis (Marriott) luxury hotel in Amman offering butler service, bespoke amenities, and world-class hospitality.

name: Toffimelt
description: A Jordanian gourmet caramel and toffee company producing and exporting specialty confectionery products.

name: Jolly Man
description: A Jordanian food company that produces and supplies beef jerky products for the local and regional market.

name: Jordan Dubai Properties
description: A real estate development company with corporate office located in Aqarco Commercial Center, Amman, focusing on residential and commercial real estate in Jordan.

name: Jordan Properties Company
description: A Jordanian real estate development and investment company focused on developing peace of mind through quality real estate projects.

name: Landmark Amman Hotel & Conference Center
description: A five-star hotel and conference center in Amman offering large-scale event hosting, accommodation, and premium dining services.

name: Opal Hotel Amman
description: A five-star hotel in Amman offering luxury accommodations, fine dining, and business facilities.

name: Abu Odeh Bros.
description: A food trading company in Jordan involved in distribution of various food and consumer goods products.

name: JLS Cargo Services
description: A cargo and freight services company based in Amman, Jordan, providing comprehensive logistics solutions.

name: Mohammad Saleh Aburumman And Sons for Clearance
name_ar: محمد صالح أبو رمان وأبناؤه للتخليص
description: A Jordanian customs clearance and logistics company providing clearance services for imported and exported goods.

name: UMIC - Edible Oils & Specialty Fats
name_ar: يو إم آي سي للزيوت الغذائية والدهون المتخصصة
description: A producer of branded and value-added edible oils and specialty fats, with brands sold throughout Jordan and the region.

name: The One Jordan
description: Known for elegant and sophisticated furniture designs, offering a curated selection of high-quality furniture including sofas, dining tables, beds, and home accessories in a modern luxury style.

name: Taj Alsafa Real Estate
description: Founded in Amman in 2014 by real estate visionaries with over two decades of elite market experience, specializing in premium real estate development.

name: Jwico Furniture
description: A locally established furniture store in Amman providing a range of home and office furniture options.

name: Thousand Nights Hotel Amman
description: A five-star hotel in Amman offering premium hospitality and accommodation services.

name: Octopus Shipping and Trading
description: A shipping and trading company based in Amman, Jordan, providing freight and shipping solutions.

name: The House Boutique Suites Amman
description: A five-star boutique hotel in Amman offering personalized luxury accommodation and premium guest services.

name: 99brightminds
description: An IT services and software outsourcing company based in Amman with additional capabilities in Egypt and Palestine (West Bank), providing software development and technology consulting.

name: Sitech Jordan
description: A versatile technology company in Amman offering cloud infrastructure solutions, SaaS development, and fintech platform creation.

name: Middle East University (MEU)
description: A private university located in Amman, Jordan, offering undergraduate and graduate programs across various disciplines.

name: Philadelphia University Jordan
description: A private university in Jerash, Jordan offering programs in engineering, sciences, business, and arts.

name: Petra University
description: A private university in Amman, Jordan, offering programs in pharmacy, engineering, IT, business, and humanities.

name: Ibn Sina University for Medical Sciences
description: A private university in Amman specializing in medical and health sciences education.

name: JIF - Jordan Insurance Federation
description: The official federation representing all insurance companies in Jordan, promoting the development of the insurance sector and protecting policyholders.

name: Association of Banks in Jordan (ABJ)
description: The official association representing 20 member banks in Jordan (15 Jordanian and 5 non-Jordanian), promoting banking sector development and representing member interests.

name: Coders Jordan
description: A leading tech company based in Amman, Jordan, specializing in Drupal services, mobile apps, Flutter, E-commerce, and startup technology solutions.

name: Abu Dhabi Islamic Bank Jordan (ADIB)
description: A Jordan-based Islamic bank offering Sharia-compliant banking products and services for retail and corporate clients.

name: Jordan Ahli Bank - Investment Division
description: The investment and financial institutions arm of Jordan Ahli Bank managing correspondent banking and international financial partnerships.

name: Majid Al Futtaim Jordan
description: The local partner of Carrefour in Jordan and a major retail and shopping mall operator, managing City Mall and other retail assets in the Kingdom.

name: Thousand Nights Boutique Hotel Aqaba
description: A boutique hotel in Aqaba offering Red Sea access, diving packages, and premium hospitality in Jordan's beach resort city.

name: Nike Jordan (Stores Amman)
description: Nike's retail presence in Amman through authorized stores in major malls, offering athletic footwear, apparel, and equipment.

name: Petra Engineering Industries (IKEA Partner)
description: A Jordanian engineering company that has partnered with IKEA for construction and fit-out projects in Jordan, known for large-scale commercial construction.

name: Motory Jordan
description: A major online platform for finding new and used cars, authorized dealers, offers and prices in Jordan.

name: Open Souq Jordan (OpenSooq)
description: A leading classified ads and online marketplace in Jordan for cars, real estate, electronics, and various consumer goods.

name: Bayut Jordan
description: An online real estate platform listing properties for sale and rent in Jordan, helping buyers, sellers, and renters find real estate companies and listings.

name: Vitalspares Jordan
description: An online directory and platform listing auto parts dealers and spare parts stores across Jordan.

name: Jordan YP (Yellow Pages Jordan)
description: Jordan's online business directory listing companies across all sectors including automotive, retail, healthcare, and services.

name: Jordanian Hashemite Human Development Fund
description: A Jordanian fund supporting human development programs focused on poverty alleviation, skills training, and social protection.

name: Jordan Petroleum Refinery Company (JPRC)
description: Founded in 1956, started production in 1961. The only crude oil refinery in Jordan, located in Zarqa city about 35 km east of Amman. Maximum refining capacity around 5 million tons per year, producing LPG, fuels, lube oils, and asphalt. Listed on Amman Stock Exchange.

name: National Petroleum Company (NPCO)
description: A government-owned public company that prospects for oil and gas in the northeastern concession area of Jordan including the Risha gas field, with a concession period of 50 years from 1996.

name: Jordan Chamber of Industry
description: The national industry association representing manufacturers across Jordan with chambers in Amman (est. 1962), Zarqa (est. 1998), and Irbid (est. 1999). Represents the industrial sector in policy and trade.

name: Al-Tajamouat Industrial Estate
description: A major industrial estate near Amman, hosting a wide range of manufacturing companies including garments, pharmaceuticals, food processing, and light industries.

name: Al-Hassan Industrial Estate
description: Located in Irbid, Al-Hassan Industrial Estate is a key manufacturing hub focusing on high-value manufacturing including pharmaceuticals, light engineering, and food processing.

name: Ad-Dulayl Industrial Park
description: An industrial park near Zarqa serving as a hub for light manufacturing, logistics, and warehousing operations close to Amman.

name: Zarqa Free Zone
description: One of the oldest and most active free zones in Jordan, serving as a critical logistics and storage hub for imports, exports, and re-exports.

name: El-Zai Ready-Wear Manufacturing Co.
description: A garment manufacturing company based in Zarqa sub-zone, producing ready-wear clothing for local and export markets.

name: Jordan Cyber City
description: A technology and industrial zone in Irbid designed to attract IT and tech companies, providing infrastructure for digital economy businesses.

name: Jordan Export Development and Commercial Centers Corporation (JEDCO)
description: Jordan's national export promotion agency working to develop export capabilities, support exporters, and expand Jordan's presence in international markets.

name: Al-Nisr Publishing & Press (Jordan Times Publisher)
description: The publisher of the Jordan Times, Jordan's leading English-language newspaper, and other publications in the Kingdom.

name: Radio Fann
description: A popular Jordanian radio station broadcasting Arabic music, entertainment, and news content for Jordanian audiences.

name: Radio Rotana Jordan
description: A satellite and FM radio station broadcasting Arabic pop music and entertainment, part of the Rotana media group.

name: Arab Medical Center Amman
description: A private medical center in Amman offering a wide range of specialist and general medical services.

name: King Hussein Cancer Center (KHCC)
description: A leading cancer treatment and research center in Amman, built by CCC, offering comprehensive oncology services including bone marrow transplantation, advanced radiation therapy, and clinical trials.

name: Royal Medical Services (RMS)
description: The military medical services organization of Jordan providing healthcare to armed forces personnel and their families through hospitals and clinics across the Kingdom.

name: Princess Basma Center for Social Development
description: A Jordanian social development center named after Princess Basma, hosting various NGO offices and running community programs for vulnerable populations in Amman.

name: USAID Jordan
description: The United States Agency for International Development operates in Jordan funding and implementing economic growth, education, health, and water programs.

name: GIZ Jordan (Deutsche Gesellschaft für Internationale Zusammenarbeit)
description: The German development agency operating in Jordan implementing technical cooperation projects in water, energy, employment, and governance sectors.

name: European Union Delegation to Jordan
description: The EU's diplomatic mission and development cooperation agency in Jordan, funding projects in refugee response, economic development, democracy, and governance.

name: WFP Jordan (World Food Programme)
description: The UN World Food Programme operates in Jordan providing food assistance to Syrian refugees and vulnerable Jordanians through cash-based transfers and food vouchers.

name: UNDP Jordan (UN Development Programme)
description: UNDP Jordan works on sustainable development goals including poverty reduction, governance, environment, and crisis response programs.

name: ILO Jordan (International Labour Organization)
description: The ILO operates in Jordan working on decent work, labor rights, employment, and skills development programs for both Jordanians and refugees.

name: Safeway Jordan X-Press
description: A network of eight Safeway X-press convenience stores across Amman providing quick access to groceries and everyday essentials.

name: Jordan Exports (JEDCO Trade Portal)
description: The official Jordan exports portal providing information on Jordanian exporters and products in sectors including pharmaceuticals and processed foods.

name: Al Balad Downtown Souq
description: The historic downtown Amman market district (Al Balad) home to traditional souqs selling gold, textiles, spices, electronics, and local crafts.

name: Jordan Cooperative Corporation
description: A government-affiliated cooperative organization managing retail outlets and providing affordable consumer goods and food products across Jordan.

name: Al Quds College
description: A community college in Amman, Jordan offering two-year diplomas and vocational programs in technology, business, and health sciences.

name: King Hussein Foundation
description: A Jordanian foundation established to continue the legacy of King Hussein I, promoting peace, moderation, human development, and economic empowerment.

name: Jordan Chamber of Commerce
description: The national chamber of commerce representing traders, merchants, and businesses in Jordan, facilitating trade and commerce through networking, advocacy, and business services.

name: Amman Chamber of Industry
description: Established in 1962, the Amman Chamber of Industry is the oldest industrial chamber in Jordan, representing manufacturers and industrial enterprises in the capital.

name: Jordan Valley Authority (JVA)
description: A Jordanian government authority responsible for managing the Jordan Valley's water resources, irrigation, and agricultural development.

name: Al-Qastal Industrial Zone
description: An industrial zone south of Amman in Al-Qastal, hosting manufacturing facilities for various light and medium industries.

name: Central Bank of Jordan (CBJ)
description: The central bank and primary financial regulatory authority of Jordan, responsible for monetary policy, banking supervision, and currency issuance.

name: Amman Stock Exchange (ASE)
description: Jordan's national stock exchange, established and operating in Amman, listing Jordanian public companies across banking, insurance, industry, and services sectors.

name: Jordan Tourism Board (JTB)
description: The official government body responsible for promoting Jordan as a tourism destination globally, marketing Jordanian heritage sites, hospitality, and adventure tourism.
